summary: The diff implements the majority of the specified requirements. The Motoko backend, upload flow, feed page, detail page, thumbnail creator, and arena-style theming are all present. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the backend's getFeed query is missing as a distinct paginated feed endpoint (only getAllContent exists), uploadContent returns unit not a post ID, and getUserPosts by principal is not exposed as a dedicated query. Overall the implementation is close but a few AC details are unmet.

missing_requirements.requirement: uploadContent update call returns a post ID
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uploadContent function returns async () (unit/void), not a post ID. The acceptance criteria states it must return a post ID.

missing_requirements.requirement: getFeed query returns a paginated array of post metadata without full blob data for listing efficiency
missing_requirements.reason: No getFeed function exists. getAllContent returns full ContentMetadata including blob references. There is no separate stripped-down feed query omitting blob data for efficiency.

missing_requirements.requirement: getUserPosts query returns posts filtered by principal
missing_requirements.reason: There is no dedicated getUserPosts query. Filtering by uploader is only possible through the generic getContentBySearchCriteria with #byUploader, which is not the named query specified in the AC.

hallucinated_features.description: View count tracking with incrementViews mutation and views field on ContentMetadata
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention view counts or view increment functionality. The backend stores a views field and the frontend calls incrementViews on the detail page, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile system with ProfileSetupModal requiring an artist/creator name on first login
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a user profile creation flow or profile setup modal. While uploader name display is mentioned in REQ-3, a full profile creation modal was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Content filter tabs (All / Audio / Video) on the feed page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a discovery feed but does not mention filter tabs by media type.
